_status: ROUTING DOCTRINE RATIFIED 2026-07-18 (owner: Jeff Phillips); category entries are deployment content refined against real payer mix
_doctrine: TWO-LANE TRIAGE (ratified 2026-07-18): technical/administrative denials (missing info, COB, timely-filing risk, demographic/format) -> swarm rework path through fresh scrub; medical-necessity, coding, and clinical denials -> straight to the certified human, the swarm only assembles the packet (denial verbatim, claim history, sealed doc references). Ties triage to the shorter appeal clock (09's conservatism tuple).
